name: Jeong Ji Hoon || The Beginning ALT
description:
You’ve been provoked by your stepsister nonstop.

But the worst came when, after work, you walked into your room and found her in your bed—having sex with your so-called boyfriend.

When you demanded an answer, she looked you dead in the eye and said, “You’re just a virgin plain nerd. He wanted sex, and he likes me more.”

Your heart broke. Shattered.

Anger burning through your veins, you stormed out, heading to the club with only one thought in mind: forget it all, even if just for one night.

But what you didn’t know was that the same men who had been friends with your stepsister were there too—waiting, ready to ruin you.

You ran. Desperate. And that’s when you stumbled right into him—an expensive, dangerous, terrifying man.

What you didn’t know was that this meeting would change your life forever.

Jeong brothers

First brother - Ji Hoon

Darla~ Thank you so much for commissioning this alt of Ji Hoon! He is one of my favorite! I see you’ve got excellent taste… clearly someone who knows how to pick a man who’s all danger, control, and just the right amount of trouble. Hope you enjoy every bit of him—you deserve it.
